exercises.title: General Notes & Warm-Up
exercises.notes:
Pull–Push Home Gym — Power Week

Hypertrophy finish: Gym Monster 2 cable block (60 s between moves; complete at GM2 without returning to calisthenics station).

Power triples: ~85–90% of today's best triple; 1 RIR on the first 2 work sets. Do not superset power work.

Skills / holds: pick a level with clean positions and 1–2 s in reserve on timed holds.

General warm-up (every day):
Band Pull-Aparts — 1x10; Band Dislocates — 1x10; Banded Scapular Protraction — 1x10; Banded Shoulder External Rotation — 1x10; Banded One-Arm Triceps Overhead Press — 1x10 per side; Banded RDLs — 1x10; Banded Bent-Over Rows — 1x10; Banded Squat to Press — 1x10; Quadruped Thoracic Rotation — 1x10 per side.

Power ramp (weighted pull/chin/dip): bodyweight × 5, light load × 3, ~50% × 3, ~70% × 2, then work sets. Rest 3–4 min on power work.

See programs/khoiphan21/push-pull-homegym for progression, tempo/volume week rules, and skill ladders.

exercises.title: Weighted Dip
exercises.notes:
Power: 3x3 (belted). Rest 3–4 min.
Pause variation on Push B day (see that routine).
Ramp: bodyweight × 5, light × 3, ~50% × 3, ~70% × 2, then work sets.

exercises.title: Iron Cross Hold Progression
exercises.notes: Skill: 3x10 s holds. Rest 2–3 min. Use ring cross progression from program doc.

exercises.title: Pike Handstand Push-Up (elevated feet)
exercises.notes: Skill: 3x3. Rest 2–3 min.

exercises.title: Bulgarian Split Squat (Cable)
exercises.notes: GM2 / cable stack: 3x8 per side. Rest 60 s between moves in this block.

exercises.title: Chest Fly (Cable)
exercises.notes: 3x12 on cable crossover / GM2.

exercises.title: Warmup: Pull - Power Week
exercises.notes:
Pull–Push Home Gym — Power Week

Hypertrophy finish: Gym Monster 2 cable block (60 s between moves; complete at GM2 without returning to calisthenics station).

Power triples: ~85–90% of today's best triple; 1 RIR on the first 2 work sets. Do not superset power work.

Skills / holds: pick a level with clean positions and 1–2 s in reserve on timed holds.

General warm-up (every day):
Band Pull-Aparts — 1x10; Band Dislocates — 1x10; Banded Scapular Protraction — 1x10; Banded Shoulder External Rotation — 1x10; Banded One-Arm Triceps Overhead Press — 1x10 per side; Banded RDLs — 1x10; Banded Bent-Over Rows — 1x10; Banded Squat to Press — 1x10; Quadruped Thoracic Rotation — 1x10 per side.

Power ramp (weighted pull/chin/dip): bodyweight × 5, light load × 3, ~50% × 3, ~70% × 2, then work sets. Rest 3–4 min on power work.

See programs/khoiphan21/push-pull-homegym for progression, tempo/volume week rules, and skill ladders.

exercises.title: Pull Up (Weighted)
exercises.notes:
Power: 3x3. Rest 3–4 min. Progress +2.5 kg after a clean 3x3.
Ramp: bodyweight × 5, light × 3, ~50% × 3, ~70% × 2, then work sets.

exercises.title: Front Lever Hold (Rings)
exercises.notes: Skill 1: 3x12 s. Rest 2–3 min. Use lever ladder in program doc.

exercises.title: Deadlift High Pull
exercises.notes: Skill 2: High pull — alternatively use Kettlebell High Pull or band high pull (see program). 3x5. Rest 2 min.

exercises.title: Inverted Row
exercises.notes: Skill 3: Tuck front-lever row on rings/bar as in program (template: Inverted Row for logging). 3x5. Rest 2–3 min.

exercises.title: Lat Pulldown (Cable)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy (GM2): 3x10. Rest 60 s in this block.

exercises.title: Seated Cable Row - Bar Grip
exercises.notes: Cable row: 3x10.

exercises.title: Warm Up
exercises.notes: Conditioning day — steady HR. Circuit ×3 rounds (rest 60–90 s between rounds); then EMOM 12 (odd: jumping jacks 45 s, even: band straight-arm pulldown 15 reps); L-sit accumulate 60 s; V-ups 3x20. Adjust set counts in app if you prefer separate logging per round.

exercises.title: Ring Row
exercises.notes: Circuit: 3x15 (one set per round in program).

exercises.title: Shoulder Press (Dumbbell)
exercises.notes: Band overhead press: template is dumbbell press for logging; use band standing on feet, press overhead. 3x15.

exercises.title: Lunge
exercises.notes: Bodyweight split squat: 3x12 per side (log 12 reps; alternate legs as in program).

exercises.title: Hollow Rock
exercises.notes: Hollow body rock: 3x20 s.

exercises.title: Jumping Jack
exercises.notes: EMOM odd minutes: 45 s work (log 6×45 s or merge as preferred).

exercises.title: Straight Arm Band Pulldown
exercises.notes: EMOM even minutes: 15 reps (6 sets for 12 min EMOM).

exercises.title: L-Sit Hold
exercises.notes: Accumulate 60 s total hold (example: 4×15 s).

exercises.title: V Up
exercises.notes: 3x20. Rest 60 s.

exercises.title: Weighted Dip
exercises.notes: Power: 3x3 with 2 s pause at bottom. Same ramp as Push A.

exercises.title: Ring Push Up
exercises.notes: Ring archer push-up: 3x6 per side (log reps; template = ring push-up). Rest 2–3 min.

exercises.title: Handstand Hold
exercises.notes: Ring support turned-out hold 3x15 s — log on handstand hold template; perform on rings in turned-out support per program.

exercises.title: Seated Shoulder Press (Machine)
exercises.notes: Overhead press on GM2 / cable stack: 3x8.

exercises.title: Bench Press (Cable)
exercises.notes: Chest press (cable): 3x12.

exercises.title: Chin Up (Weighted)
exercises.notes: Power: 3x3. Same ramp style as weighted pull-up.

exercises.title: Muscle Up
exercises.notes: Bar muscle up: warm-up 1×3 easier variation, then 3x3. Rest 2 min. Use progression ladder in program doc.

exercises.title: Archer Pull-Up
exercises.notes: 3x4 per side.

exercises.title: Front Lever Hold
exercises.notes: Skill superset A1: back lever tuck hold 3x12 s (log on front lever hold; follow back lever regressions in program). Superset with Nordic.

exercises.title: Nordic Hamstrings Curls
exercises.notes: A2: 3x6, band-assist as needed. Rest 60 s after A2.

exercises.title: Seated Cable Row - Bar Wide Grip
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy (GM2): 3x10.

exercises.title: Iso-Lateral High Row (Machine)
exercises.notes: High-to-low row on GM2 cables (log as iso-lateral high row or closest cable path). 3x15.
